keywords: three path moderation PASS REJECT UNCERTAIN human queue PENDING state binary collapse FLOW-08 conflict moderationPaths
ironRules: Exactly 3 moderation outcomes: PASS → ReviewPublished, REJECT → ReviewRejected, UNCERTAIN → ReviewFlaggedForHuman
UNCERTAIN maps to PENDING status — never to REJECTED status
A PENDING review can be published after human decision — it is not a final rejection
Two FREEDOM config thresholds: pass_threshold and reject_threshold — between them is UNCERTAIN
DPO triple annotation: conflictsWith FLOW-08 binary moderation (confidence < threshold → REJECT)
